steps.name: Opportunity: NPN Stage: Booked Status: Open
Send SMS to ask Patient to confirm

detail.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Your initial medical evaluation at Men’s Wellness Centers {{contact.location}} has been scheduled for {{appointment.start_time}}.

This time has been reserved specifically for you.

To officially secure your visit, please confirm your appointment using the button below.
{{trigger_link.InI8MiYE24HtvPLNLvel}}

{{contact.first_name}}, your Men’s Wellness consultation is set for {{appointment.start_time}} ({{contact.preferred_location}}).

We’re a physician-led men’s clinic focused on energy and performance. Your hour includes a provider consult, same-day labs and comprehensive review with your provider.

Reply Y to confirm.

Questions? Call or text (866) 344-4955.
Reply STOP to opt out.

detail.subject: Appointment Cancelled: Men's Wellness Centers {{contact.preferred_location}} | {{appointment.start_time}} ({{appointment.timezone}})
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

This email confirms that your appointment scheduled for {{appointment.start_time}} ({{appointment.timezone}}) has been successfully cancelled.

If your plans change, you can schedule a new appointment HERE.

If there’s anything we can assist you with, call or text us at 866-344-4955.

We appreciate you letting us know in advance.

Sincerely,

Men's Wellness Center

detail.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, we’ve confirmed the cancellation of your appointment on {{appointment.start_time}}.

If your plans change, you’re welcome to schedule a new visit here:
https://menswellnesscenters.com/book-a-consultation/

We’re here if you need anything.

steps.name: Clear Intake Fields to prepare for updated intake form in the future

fields: Current medications (include name, dose, and how often you take them)
Do you currently smoke or use tobacco products?
Have you ever been diagnosed with any of the following? (Check all that apply)
Have you ever used testosterone or other hormone therapy?
How did you hear about Men’s Wellness Centers?
How long have these symptoms been present?
I acknowledge that I have received and understand the Notice of Privacy Practices.
I authorize Men’s Wellness Centers and its licensed medical providers to evaluate, diagnose, and treat me, including laboratory testing when medically appropriate.
I confirm the information I provided is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
I understand that my care may be provided in person and, when clinically appropriate, via telemedicine.
If yes, please provide brief details (optional)

detail.subject: Checking in. Questions on how we can help?
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

It’s been a while since you last visited Men’s Wellness Center, so we just wanted to check in.

If you’re still experiencing symptoms or have questions about your health, a confidential consultation can help you understand your options — no pressure, no obligation.

If you’d like to schedule an appointment, you can do so anytime here:
Schedule Your Appointment

And if now isn’t the right time, that’s completely okay. We’re here whenever you’re ready.

Best,
Men’s Wellness Center

detail.subject: We tried to reach you but your number is INVALID
detail.body_text:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

The contact number you provided us, {{contact.phone}}, is invalid. Please reply you working phone number so we can continue reaching out to you for updates.

Best regards,

{{location.name}}

detail.subject: Future Updates Available via SMS
detail.body_text:
Hello {{contact.first_name}},

Your future updates could be sent via SMS for added convenience. If you would like to receive reminders and announcements by text, simply reply to this email with an SMS‑capable phone number.

Thank you,
{{location.name}}

detail.subject: Update Your Contact Information
detail.body_text:
Hello {{contact.first_name}},

We recently tried reaching you at the number on file ({{contact.phone}}), but it appears to be incorrect. To ensure you continue receiving important updates and reminders, we’d like to confirm your best contact number.

Please reply to this email with your correct phone number, and we’ll update your record right away.

Thank you for helping us keep your information current.

{{location.name}}

steps.name: Send SMS Outside Office Hours Welcome Message

detail.body: Thank you for contacting Men’s Wellness Centers. Our office is currently closed, but we’ve received your message. Our team is available Monday through Saturday from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM and will respond as soon as we are back in the office.

steps.name: Email Outside Office Hours Welcome Message

detail.subject: Thank You for Contacting Us
detail.preheader: Our Team Will Contact You Soon
detail.body_text:
Thank you for contacting Men’s Wellness Centers.

Our office is currently closed, but we have received your message. Our team is available Monday through Saturday from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM, and we will respond as soon as we return.

We look forward to connecting with you soon.

Sincerely,
{{location.name}}
